privileged_info_summary: The task uses OpenMaint 2.4 (CMDBuild 4.1.0) running on localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/ with HTTP 200 confirmed reachability. Default credentials are admin/admin (official demo database credentials). The environment loads the OpenMAINT standard demo.dump.xz synthetic database containing 5 pre-configured demo building records. The Buildings section is navigable and displays these records in list/cards view. The Docker setup uses official itmicus/cmdbuild:om-2.4-4.1.0 image with postgis/postgis:17-3.5-alpine database backend.
